targets.rawSql: SELECT hypertable_schema || '.' || hypertable_name AS hypertable, chunk_schema || '.' || chunk_name AS chunk, range_start, range_end, pg_size_pretty(total_bytes) AS chunk_size, total_bytes FROM timescaledb_information.chunks ORDER BY hypertable_name, range_start DESC

SELECT time_bucket('30 minutes', recorded_at) AS time, metric_name, SUM(metric_value) AS value FROM ops.pipeline_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= $__timeFrom() AND recorded_at <= $__timeTo() GROUP BY time, metric_name ORDER BY time

SELECT hypertable_schema || '.' || hypertable_name AS hypertable, num_chunks, pg_size_pretty(before_compression_total_bytes) AS total_size, pg_size_pretty(before_compression_table_bytes) AS table_size, pg_size_pretty(before_compression_index_bytes) AS index_size FROM timescaledb_information.hypertable_compression_stats UNION ALL SELECT ht.hypertable_schema || '.' || ht.hypertable_name AS hypertable, ht.num_chunks, pg_size_pretty(pg_total_relation_size(ht.hypertable_schema || '.' || ht.hypertable_name)) AS total_size, NULL AS table_size, NULL AS index_size FROM timescaledb_information.hypertables ht ORDER BY hypertable

SELECT schemaname AS schema, tablename AS table, pg_size_pretty(pg_total_relation_size(schemaname || '.' || tablename)) AS total_size, pg_total_relation_size(schemaname || '.' || tablename) AS size_bytes FROM pg_tables WHERE schemaname IN ('raw', 'bronze', 'silver', 'analytics', 'ops') ORDER BY pg_total_relation_size(schemaname || '.' || tablename) DESC

SELECT time_bucket('1 day', recorded_at) AS time, labels->>'ticker' AS ticker, SUM(metric_value) AS rows FROM ops.pipeline_metrics WHERE metric_name = 'eod_rows_ingested' AND recorded_at >= $__timeFrom() AND recorded_at <= $__timeTo() GROUP BY time, labels->>'ticker' ORDER BY time

SELECT time_bucket('1 day', recorded_at) AS time, metric_name, SUM(metric_value) AS value FROM ops.pipeline_metrics WHERE metric_name IN ('eod_pipeline_completed', 'quality_audit_completed') AND recorded_at >= $__timeFrom() AND recorded_at <= $__timeTo() GROUP BY time, metric_name ORDER BY time
